changes: Foreground Service Priority: startForeground() is now strictly the first line of execution.
NSD Rebuild: Integrated MulticastLock and health pulses to prevent discovery deadlocks.
Netty Isolation: Isolated Netty in its own coroutine scope with an autonomous watchdog.
Engine Watchdog: Monitors sub-engines (NSD, Netty) and restarts them independently without dropping the service.
Upload Limit Removal: Removed all memory and size caps (~2GB+ support).
Event Deduplication: 1.5s window logic in ViewModel to prevent duplicate UI updates.
Discovery Pipeline: Fixed candidate collection and registry synchronization.
